collections.name: The Fall Of The Orc King
The Fall Of The Goblin King

requires.name: Amulet of the Goblin King's Soul

recipes.description: An impossible pendant wrought from the full Ashscript inheritance and every surviving boss-signature of the event. Each Mana Shield pulse answers with healing.
recipes.power: PvP only. Whenever you gain or refresh Mana Shield, heal by 1% of your max health.

recipes.description: Boots stepped through broken constellations and back. Their defense rises with the seal, and their wearer strikes harder behind a living Mana Shield.
recipes.power: Increase Defense stat by 3%. PvP only. While you have an active Mana Shield, increase Attack stat by 5%.

recipes.description: Legendary gloves bound in archive script and furnace-thread, made to keep a mage steady while Mana Shield turns strain into force.
recipes.power: Increase Defense stat by 3%. PvP only. While you have an active Mana Shield, increase Attack stat by 5%.

recipes.description: A ceremonial robe reworked into battle vestments, lined with surviving testimony and the last geometry of the seals.
recipes.power: Increase Defense stat by 3%. PvP only. While you have an active Mana Shield, increase Attack stat by 5%.

recipes.description: A crown-hood formed from preserved ward-script and memory lacquer. It hardens the wearer and rewards those who refuse to let their Mana Shield break.
recipes.power: Increase Defense stat by 3%. PvP only. While you have an active Mana Shield, increase Attack stat by 5%.

recipes.description: Vaeliths final staff. Its core remembers the shape of containment magic, and every restored Mana Shield answers with violence.
recipes.power: Increase Attack stat by 10%. PvP only. Whenever you gain or refresh Mana Shield, deal slash damage to a random living enemy.

recipes.description: A fortress-like basalt helm etched with ancient runes and glowing molten veins. It radiates the presence of an unbreakable guardian.
Massive rune-etched gauntlets of basalt and ember-forged metal. Their weight and strength are made for crushing impact and steadfast defense.
Towering war boots reinforced with layered greaves and molten seams. Each step carries the weight and certainty of a siege engine.
A colossal basalt-steel cuirass infused with molten channels and defensive runes. Forged to turn its wearer into a living wall.

Viridictum is not forged, it is condensed judgment.
Born from living Venom, this dagger carries poison that decides, not merely wounds. Every cut implants a living verdict inside the target, a toxin that adapts, hunts, and escalates until the victim either falls... or is deemed unworthy to continue existing.
recipes.power: Increases the chance to infect enemies with poison on hit by 20%.if the player is a hunter , increase poison damage by 20%.

recipes.description: Armor engraved with poison channels that pulse with viridian energy.
Boots that corrode the ground and leave poisonous footprints.
Gauntlets that inject venom directly into enemies on contact.
A helmet worn by toxic rat knights, constantly leaking lunar poison vapor.

Greaves forged from Divine Water Iron and blessed by Poseidon himself.
Each step anchors the wearer with the weight of the ocean floor, unmoved by waves, storms, or divine pressure.
recipes.power: Increase its stats by 150% of your water elemental rate.

recipes.description:
A helm infused with Poseidon's will, radiating unquestionable dominance.
Those who face its bearer feel the same dread as sailors standing before a rising horizon.
recipes.power: Increase its stats by 150% of your water elemental rate.

recipes.description:
Gauntlets bearing Poseidon's authority over all waters.
The sea answers the wielder’s hands, bending tides and crushing resistance with effortless control.
recipes.power: Increase its stats by 150% of your water elemental rate.

recipes.description:
A divine cuirass layered with Sovereign Scales and flowing tidal runes.
The armor does not block force, it redirects it, turning divine pressure into controlled flow.
recipes.power: Increase its stats by 150% of your water elemental rate.

recipes.description:
Forged from Divine Water Iron and sanctioned by Poseidon's Edict,
Thalassarion is not merely a weapon , it is a decree given form.

Its strikes carry the authority of the ocean itself, overwhelming defenses and asserting dominion where resistance once stood.
recipes.power: Increase its stats by 300% of your water elemental rate.

recipes.description:
A reforged Tidebound trident strengthened with Titan-forged metal and primordial tidal essence.
The weapon retains its original fluid balance, but its core now carries the crushing weight of abyssal depths.
The original Tidebound chestplate, reforged with Titan materials. Its flexible plates have been thickened and bound with glowing Titan veins.
The Tidebound Helm reforged using Titan scale. The original wave engraved plates remain, now reinforced with deep sea metal and glowing Titan runes.
The Tidebound Helm reforged using Titan scale. The original wave-engraved plates remain, now reinforced with deep-sea metal and glowing Titan runes.
A Titan-forged relic that fractures divine shields. Without it, Poseidon cannot be harmed.

A growth that should not exist.
This fruit forms only where arcane saturation collapses inward where magic has consumed itself and left behind something hungry.

A shield forged to withstand the end of ages.
Each blow absorbed deepens the eternal cold within.
Those who strike it lose the will to fight.
recipes.power: Increase HP By 15%

recipes.description:
A divine artifact corrupted by demon winter.
It heals allies by stealing warmth from the world itself,
and condemns enemies to holy frost annihilation.
recipes.power: Increase Defense Stat By 15%

recipes.description:
A staff once raised against the heavens themselves.
Its spells do not freeze enemies,
they collapse reality into stillness.
recipes.power: Increase Attack Stat By 10%

recipes.description:
Forged from the Behemoth's Frozen Core and carved along the edge with a Behemoth Frozen Fang, this dagger carries the stillness of a creature that ruled winter itself.
The daggers exhales a pale frost with every movement, and its edge bites not with sharpness alone, but with the authority of absolute cold.
recipes.power: Increase Crit Rate by 5% and Crit damage by 10%.

recipes.description: An amulet shaped from a splinter of a ruined throne, empowering its bearer to pierce through both flesh and royal enchantments.
recipes.power: Increase Critical Rate By 5%

recipes.description: A battle-forged ring worn by those who challenge sovereign power on the battlefield itself.
recipes.power: Increase Critical Rate By 2.5%

recipes.description: A heavy signet forged to protect the royal lineage, engraved with a fractured crown crest.
recipes.power: Increase Critical Rate By 2.5%

recipes.description: Boots forged from tempered obsidian, their soles never cool, each step leaves faint scorch marks.
Tempered in dragonfire and cooled in the blood of a fallen guardian, this ring hums faintly with the rhythm of living flame. The scales along its edge shift color as heat passes through them.
Gauntlets etched with runes of flame, each punch leaves a trace of smoldering light.
Fashioned from the heart scale of a lizardman high priest, this amulet channels both protection and fury. When its core glows, the air around it ripples like molten glass.
Crowned with a ridge of cooled magma, this helm radiates a quiet heat that steadies its wearer's resolve.
A chestplate of layered obsidian and gold, its molten veins glow faintly when struck.
Forged in blood, bone, and pumpkin flame, the Ring of the Eternal Harvest binds the wearer to All Hallow's magic. Its glow never fades, feeding on the souls of the fallen.
recipes.power: PVE only. Heals You by 5% Of The Damage Received And Increase Your Armor Penetration by 5% .

recipes.description: Fist-guards inlaid with runic crystal veins. Each strike builds kinetic charge, amplifying the next blow. Ram-head sigils on the wrists flare amber when the charge peaks, momentarily overwhelming lesser shields.
recipes.power:
PvP only. If you are the Attacker: Increase your ATK Stats by 5%.
If you are the Defender: Convert the equipment's ATK stat to DEF And Increase your DEF Stats by 5%.

recipes.description: Bronze greaves etched with spiral horns along the shins. Every step channels stored kinetic force into the ground, leaving faint teal sparks in the dust. Grants increased momentum and reduced knockback during charges.
recipes.power:
PvP only. If you are the Attacker: Increase your ATK Stats by 5%.
If you are the Defender: Convert the equipment's ATK stat to DEF And Increase your DEF Stats by 5%.

recipes.description: A bronze war-helm crowned with curved ram horns that channel teal lightning. Its visor glows with an inner crystal eye that heightens battle focus, granting brief clarity at the onset of each duel. Whispered legend says the horns resonate with every clash of steel.
recipes.power:
PvP only. If you are the Attacker: Increase your ATK Stats by 5%.
If you are the Defender: Convert the equipment's ATK stat to DEF And Increase your DEF Stats by 5%.

recipes.description: A bronze ram-headed guard that blooms into a crescent shield around a needle-keen lance. Forged to hold the line and break it in the same breath, its runes pulse from warm amber to teal as it turns defense into momentum.
recipes.power:
PvP only. If you are the Attacker: Increase your ATK Stats by 10%.
If you are the Defender: Convert the equipment's ATK stat to DEF And Increase your DEF Stats by 10%.

recipes.description: Heavy segmented armor engraved with the sigil of the Ram saint. Bronze plates hide a lattice of kinetic crystals that hum with stored impact energy. When struck, the armor releases a resonant pulse that lessens incoming damage and briefly strengthens the wearer's stance.
recipes.power:
PvP only. If you are the Attacker: Increase your ATK Stats by 5%.
If you are the Defender: Convert the equipment's ATK stat to DEF And Increase your DEF Stats by 5%.

recipes.description:
Formed from fire-blackened dragonhide and molten-hardened steel.
Each plate is etched with smoldering runes, and when the wearer moves, faint embers flicker at their steps. These greaves embody both strength and mobility, designed for dragon-slaying battlefields.
recipes.power: 2.5% Extra Damage To Monsters,+ Another 2.5% Against Dragons

recipes.description:
Gauntlets lined with dragonhide leather, tipped with obsidian claws.
Infused with the essence of shattered dragon talons, they grant crushing grip strength and the power to tear through even enchanted steel.
recipes.power: 2.5% Extra Damage To Monsters,+ Another 2.5% Against Dragons

recipes.description:
Overlapping crimson and emerald scales form this unbreakable chestplate.
Tempered in dragonfire and etched with glowing runes, the armor channels draconic fury while protecting its bearer from even the fiercest flames.
recipes.power: 2.5% Extra Damage To Monsters,+ Another 2.5% Against Dragons

recipes.description:
Legendary helm forged from the skull of a slain wyrm.
Its jagged horns and obsidian edges radiate raw intimidation. The visor is reinforced with dragon bone, said to sharpen the wearer's senses and shield their mind against terror.
Effect: Greatly increases resistance to fear, intimidation, and fire.
recipes.power: 2.5% Extra Damage To Monsters,+ Another 2.5% Against Dragons

recipes.description: When the Bloodforged Emerald Boots drank the Orc King's Essence, their verdant filigree blackened and veined crimson. A cool purple mist curls off each step like trailing banners, and the ground itself seems to yield before your march.
recipes.power: Increase Critical Damage By 5%

recipes.description: Once verdant and calm, the inlays have scorched into crimson veins that pulse with a marching beat. With every step, black-green motes spill from the seams like cinders, gripping the ground and driving you forward. Don them, and your stride hardens under fire and your focus narrows against Orc-kind—as if a fallen warlord’s relentless march now echoes beneath your heels.

When the Bloodforged Emerald Gloves drank the Orc King’s Essence, their emerald inlays blackened and veined crimson. Violet mist coils around the fingers; every strike lands like a war-drum beat, and lesser warlords flinch at its touch.
recipes.power: Increase Critical Damage By 5%

recipes.description: Once cool and verdant, the inlays have scorched into crimson veins that throb under the plating. Black-green motes seep from the seams like breath on cold iron, and a low war-drum seems to beat in your knuckles. Wearing them hardens your grip and fans a focused wrath toward Orc-kind—as if a fallen warlord's ferocity now lives in your hands.

When the Bloodforged Emerald Armor drank the Orc King's Essence, its plates ossified into an obsidian lattice veined in crimson. A cool purple mist leaks from the seams, and a distant war drum steadies the bearer's stance. Under its gaze, lesser warlords waver.
recipes.power: Increase Critical Damage By 5%

recipes.description: Once a calm, glinting relic, the armor now runs with crimson veins where orcish war essence seared through its plates. A low drumbeat thrums in the metal, and black-green motes leak from the seams like breath in cold air. Wearing it steels your stance under siege and sharpens your wrath against Orc kind as if a fallen warlord’s grit has settled over your heart.

When the Bloodforged Emerald Helm drank the Orc King’s Essence, its emerald filigree turned to an obsidian lattice veined in crimson. A cool violet mist seeps from the visor’s slits, and the echo of a war-drum steadies the bearer’s heart. Lesser warlords feel their resolve thin beneath its gaze.
recipes.power: Increase Critical Damage By 5%

recipes.description: Once a tranquil emerald artifact, the helm now runs with crimson veins where the Orc war-essence burned through its inlays. A low drumbeat seems to thrum inside the metal, and black-green motes leak from the vents like breath on a cold night. Those who wear it feel steadier under siege and fiercer as if a fallen warlord’s resolve has taken roost behind their eyes.

When the Bloodforged Emerald Spear drank the Orc King's Essence, its emerald core blackened and bloomed a violet crown. The weapon now rules the battlefield with cold authority, a dark mist coils from its blade, and lesser warlords bow or break before it.
recipes.power: Increase Critical Damage By 20%

recipes.description: The Emerald Spear, once radiant with tranquil power, has been bathed in the fury of fallen Orc Chiefs. The weapon’s shaft now glows a deep crimson under its emerald sheen, and faint whispers of war-cries echo when it strikes. This spear thirsts for battle, feeding on the rage that forged it.

Scalescourge is no mere sword, it is a curse made steel. Forged from trollish black iron and quenched in rivers of reptilian blood, its jagged edge is carved with runes that blaze in crimson fire. With every Lizardman slain, the blade hums with hunger, its aura flaring like burning blood under the moonlight. To the scaled, its name is whispered only as doom.
recipes.power: 10% Extra Damage To Monsters,+ Another 10% Against Dragons

recipes.description: A necklace strung with sharpened orc fangs.

Heavy copper-plated boots transformed into a gleaming emerald green through the infusion of goblin agility and orcish strength. Each step resonates with primal power, granting the wearer unmatched stability and driving force in battle. The ground seems to quake beneath their march, a warning to all who stand in their path.

Forged in the fires of hobgoblin discipline and infused with the chaotic vigor of goblins and the raw might of orcs, these gloves radiate a deep emerald glow. Copper plates turned verdant green reinforce the knuckles and forearms, channeling primal energy into every blow. Strikes land heavier, faster, and with a predatory precision that leaves enemies reeling.

This imposing armor is the pinnacle of hobgoblin metallurgy, transformed by the infusion of goblin essence and orc essence into a deep, gleaming green. The plates hum faintly with primal energy, granting the wearer the cunning of goblins and the brute strength of orcs. Each strike it endures seems to feed its power, making its bearer an unyielding force on the battlefield.

A rare helm born from the union of hobgoblin craftsmanship, goblin cunning, and orcish ferocity. Its once-bronze copper plating now gleams with a deep emerald hue, faintly pulsing with the mixed essences within. The wearer feels a surge of primal instinct and unwavering resolve, striking fear into foes with a single glance through its narrow, battle-hardened visor.

A masterwork spear forged from the disciplined craftsmanship of the hobgoblin legions and infused with the wild energies of goblins and the raw fury of orcs. Its polished copper has turned a deep emerald green, glowing faintly with swirling primal essence. Light in the hand yet devastating in combat, each thrust delivers a surge of feral power capable of piercing the toughest armor.
